title: ValoCraft
description: A lightweight, high-performance Minecraft modpack that seamlessly integrates VALORANT's core tactical gameplay into the familiar block world. Built on Fabric for buttery-smooth performance without sacrificing the strategic depth of ability-based combat.
body:
A lightweight, high-performance Minecraft modpack that brings VALORANT’s core tactical gameplay into the familiar block world. Built on Fabric and heavily optimized for maximum performance—even on low-end PCs, it delivers smooth gameplay without sacrificing competitive depth.

The modpack features guns and tactical combat, the iconic BIND map from VALORANT. With the e4mc mod, players can easily invite friends to their world without setting up a dedicated server. Carefully selected shaders are included to enhance visuals while maintaining excellent performance.

Designed for fast load times, stable FPS, and intense tactical action, this modpack blends VALORANT’s precision gameplay with Minecraft’s flexibility for a refined, competitive experience.

ALL the Mods credit goes to their respected owner and Modpack credit goes to @Battlezent.
